service_data.warranty: 3 years / 36,000 miles basic; 5 years / 60,000 miles powertrain

dashboard_warnings: Check engine light: Indicates emissions or engine issues; seek service.
Low oil pressure: Stop engine and check oil level immediately.
maintenance_alerts: Service soon: Scheduled maintenance due based on mileage.
Tire pressure low: Inflate tires to recommended PSI.
basic_troubleshooting: If vehicle won't start: Check battery connections and fuses.
If ABS light is on: Schedule brake system inspection.

service_data.oil_change_interval: Every 7,500 miles or 6 months (performance engines may require more frequent service)
service_data.warranty: 3 years / 36,000 miles basic; 5 years / 60,000 miles powertrain

dashboard_warnings: Engine temperature high: Pull over safely and allow engine to cool.
Low fuel: Refuel soon to avoid running out of fuel.
maintenance_alerts: Oil life low: Change oil as soon as possible.
Service traction control: System requires inspection.
basic_troubleshooting: If check engine light blinks: Reduce speed and seek service.
If battery warning appears: Check alternator and battery connections.

service_data.warranty: 3 years / 36,000 miles basic; 5 years / 60,000 miles powertrain

dashboard_warnings: Door ajar: Ensure all doors are closed before driving.
maintenance_alerts: Service AWD: All-wheel-drive system requires inspection.
Tire pressure monitoring: Check and inflate tires.
basic_troubleshooting: If parking sensors fail: Check sensor area for dirt or obstructions.
If infotainment unresponsive: Restart system by turning vehicle off and on.

service_data.oil_change_interval: Every 7,500 miles or 6 months (hybrid models may vary)
service_data.warranty: 3 years / 36,000 miles basic; 5 years / 60,000 miles powertrain

dashboard_warnings: Hybrid system warning: Seek dealer service for hybrid-specific issues.
maintenance_alerts: Battery service required: Hybrid battery may need inspection.
Oil life low: Schedule oil change.
basic_troubleshooting: If traction control light stays on: Inspect tires and sensors.
If key fob not detected: Replace battery or use backup start procedure.

service_data.warranty: 3 years / 36,000 miles basic; 5 years / 60,000 miles powertrain

dashboard_warnings: 4x4 system warning: Check transfer case and 4x4 components.
Low oil pressure: Stop engine and check oil level.
maintenance_alerts: Towing mode: Follow towing guidelines in manual.
basic_troubleshooting: If trailer sway detected: Reduce speed and check hitch.
If engine misfires: Check spark plugs and fuel system.
